articles.title: New photo released in unsolved 1997 homicide of a N.H. woman
articles.description:
“Our family wants to know what happened, who did this and why,” said the family of the victim.

The post New photo released in unsolved 1997 homicide of a N.H. woman appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New photo released in 1997 homicide case of New Hampshire woman, seeking public assistance.
Victim's family continues to seek answers and justice for the unresolved case.
Boston residents urged to share any information that could help solve the homicide.

articles.title: Man allegedly kills man in R.I. before causing car crash that killed 2 in Mass.
articles.description:
“On behalf of the Cranston Police Department, I want to extend my deepest condolences to the family and loved ones of Javon Lawson and the two individuals who were killed in the crash in Swansea,” Col. Michael J. Winquist said.

The post Man allegedly kills man in R.I. before causing car crash that killed 2 in Mass. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Man allegedly killed Javon Lawson in Rhode Island before fleeing to Massachusetts.
The suspect caused a car crash in Swansea, resulting in two additional fatalities.
Local authorities express condolences, highlighting the tragic impact on families in the community.

articles.title: Weighing the pros and cons of a Robert Thomas trade for Bruins
articles.description:
The Bruins will need to part with several draft picks and blue-chip prospects in order to pry Thomas out of St. Louis.

The post Weighing the pros and cons of a Robert Thomas trade for Bruins appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins considering trade for Robert Thomas from St. Louis Blues.
Trade could require multiple draft picks and top prospects.
Potential trade impacts Bruins' future roster and development strategy.
